About Press
Subscribe to PMovies
What are you looking for?

PMovies – Top 100 Films of All Time & Movie Recommendations

PMovies is a community-powered film discovery platform where you can explore the top 100 films of all time, voted for by real film lovers. Whether you're looking for the best movies ever made, personalised mood-based movie recommendations, or want to find out what's now in cinemas near you — PMovies is your home for film discovery.

Community-Voted Top 100 Films

Our Top 100 Films list is shaped entirely by the community. Every vote counts. Discover the greatest films of all time across every genre — from classics like The Godfather and Schindler's List to modern masterpieces like Parasite, Interstellar and The Dark Knight. Browse the full list, vote for your favourites and help decide the definitive ranking.

Mood-Based Movie Recommendations

Not sure what to watch? Our cinematic journey feature guides you through a series of film choices tailored to your mood right now — whether you want something dark and intense, emotionally moving, funny, action-packed or quietly beautiful. Answer a few questions and discover the perfect film for how you feel today.

What's in Cinemas Now

Stay up to date with what's currently showing in cinemas. PMovies tracks now-playing films and keeps you connected to the big-screen experience.

Film Reviews & Fan Art

Read community reviews, watch trailers, explore fan art posters and connect with fellow film lovers. PMovies is built by film fans, for film fans.

🔥

Connect Firebase to enable fan reviews

Follow the 3-step guide below, then paste your Firebase config here.

📋 How to set up Firebase (3 min)
  1. Go to console.firebase.google.com
  2. Create project → Add Web App → copy the config values above
  3. In the left menu: Firestore Database → Create database → Start in test mode
  4. Paste apiKey, authDomain, projectId above and click CONNECT

📲 Add PMovies to your Home Screen

2. Scroll down and tap Add to Home Screen
3. Tap Add — done!
